title: The AAIB has sent a team of inspectors to East Fortune Airfield, near Edinburgh
body: "The AAIB has been notified of an accident involving a light aircraft which occurred yesterday evening at East Fortune Airfield, near Edinburgh. An investigation has been launched and a multidisciplinary team of inspectors has been sent to the accident site to gather evidence and begin making enquiries.     Media enquiries:      During office hours 01932 440015   Out of office hours 0300 777 7878     "
